title: Self-Supervised RGB-T Tracking with Modality-Interactive Tokens
abstract: Self-supervised RGB-T tracking approaches have garnered significant attention to reduce reliance on large-scale annotations.
tldr: 自监督 RGB-T 跟踪通过交互式 token 改进模态融合

title: MambaVT: Spatio-Temporal Contextual Modeling for robust RGB-T Tracking
abstract: Existing RGB-T tracking algorithms leverage global interaction capability.
tldr: MambaVT 用于鲁棒 RGB-T 跟踪的时空上下文建模

title: Cross Fusion RGB-T Tracking with Bi-directional Adapter
abstract: State-of-the-art RGB-T trackers achieve remarkable results through modality fusion.
tldr: 双向适配器跨模态融合 RGB-T 跟踪

title: Transformer-based RGB-T Tracking with Channel and Spatial Feature Fusion
abstract: The main problem in RGB-T tracking is the correct and optimal merging of cross-modal features.
tldr: 基于 Transformer 的通道和空间特征融合 RGB-T 跟踪

title: BTMTrack: Robust RGB-T Tracking via Dual-template Bridging
abstract: RGB-T tracking leverages complementary strengths of RGB and thermal infrared modalities.
tldr: 双模板桥接和时间模态候选消除的鲁棒 RGB-T 跟踪

title: QueryTrack: Joint-Modality Query Fusion Network for RGBT Tracking
abstract: Existing RGB-Thermal trackers treat intra-modal feature extraction and inter-modal feature fusion as separate processes.
tldr: 联合模态查询融合网络用于 RGB-T 跟踪
